tap_button_in_time: Tap the button in time with the clicks
play_low_e_string: Play low E string (or lowest open string)
play_high_string: Play high string (or highest open string)
ready_to_calibrate: Ready to calibrate. Press Start when you're ready to play.
intro_lead: Let us measure your setup in 4 quick steps so the game can detect your notes reliably.
intro_step3: 🎸 Play your open low E string
intro_hint: Have your instrument in your hands. The tap test is first — then put it down briefly for the noise step.
silence_lead: Stay quiet — don't touch your instrument.
low_lead: Play your open low E string and hold it.
low_hint: Guitar: E2 (82 Hz) · Bass: E1 (41 Hz)
high_lead: Play your open {{string}} and hold it.
